news.t: Horizon Adds Three ETFs to Its Growing Lineup of Solutions Tailored to Today's Modern Financial Advisor

overview.description: The Horizon Managed Risk ETF (SFTY) is an exchange-traded fund that mostly invests in target outcome asset allocation. The fund is actively managed, seeking exposure to US large-cap equities, while shifting to short-term fixed income securities in times of heightened market volatility. The fund also utilizes tactical options strategies as part of its approach. SFTY was launched on Jun 25, 2025 and is issued by Horizon.

data.title: Horizon Adds Three ETFs to Its Growing Lineup of Solutions Tailored to Today's Modern Financial Advisor
data.text: CHARLOTTE, N.C.--(BUSINESS WIRE)--Horizon announces launch of three new Exchange Traded Funds (ETFs) on the Chicago Board Options Exchange (CBOE).
